format_discipline.notes: First non-empty line is the H1 title; no leading YAML. Sidecar parses with word_count/estimated_read_minutes/citations_used/sections. Fixed six sections present, correct order, none added/renamed/dropped.

length.notes: 1293 within [1200,1600]. Intuition-only STANDARD course runs near the floor; count is comfortably inside the band, not a near-floor edge case. No hard-fail.

citations.notes: All three corpus primaries ([1] APXML, [2] DataCamp, [3] Viso.ai) cited inline and listed in References. No orphan markers, no orphan bibliography entries, no fabricated markers.

forward_references.notes: F1 (8.4) and by-hand compute (8.5) are name-and-deferred only at L107 ('comes next in 8.4', 'comes in 8.5') — bare names + pointer, not bolded, not defined, not taught. No ROC/AUC/calibration anywhere.

faithfulness.notes: Sampled ~10 assertions (precision/recall definitions and ratios, true positive, confidence score + threshold trade-off, cost-of-error decision rule, cancer/disease/fraud recall-first cases, search/moderation/QC In-Practice patterns). All trace verbatim or paraphrased to topic_corpus.md. No new claims introduced.

beginner_readability.notes: Terms defined before use with bold-term/plain-meaning shape (false positive, false negative, true positive, precision, recall, confidence score, threshold). Concrete-first (cat photos, spam filter). No jargon dump, no hedging, no academic register. Matches the artifact-mix fresher-zero-background baseline.

formatting.notes: Chunked into bullets/numbered lists; contrast table (precision vs recall) present per formatting_standards; paragraphs <=4 sentences; inline examples next to concepts; Worked Example as numbered procedure. No wall_of_text, no unlisted_sequence, no assessment_reference.

scope.notes: Reading stays on the headline (precision vs recall trade-off, when recall wins). Advanced/adjacent items (F1, by-hand compute) are mention-and-defer only. No scope_creep.

diagram_embedded.notes: Inline embed ![Threshold dial: precision vs recall trade-off](./diagram.png) with caption at L62-63. embeds_diagram=true in meta. NOTE: the referenced diagram.png file is NOT present in artifacts/ (only diagram.mmd) — the reading's embed reference is correct, but PNG render existence is the diagram-critic's gate, not this critic's hard-fail. Flagged for the diagram pipeline / HITL #3.

verdict: PASS. Reading 8.3 meets the reading-critic bar: 1293 words in [1200,1600], faithful to corpus with clean [1][2][3] citations, fixed six sections in order, beginner-tone and scannable formatting, F1/by-hand named-and-deferred only with no ROC/AUC/calibration leakage, and the diagram embed reference is inline. No gold reading example present in .claude/references/gold-examples/reading/, so judged against the written standards. One non-blocking finding: the embedded ./diagram.png is absent from artifacts/ (only diagram.mmd exists) — render/existence is the diagram-critic's gate; surface at HITL #3.
